docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO FEB-20-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-29-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,636.66 FILED BY HOMESHARE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ, EDWIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF HOMESHARE INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY COLIN BLUESTONE, SENIOR BUSINESS OPERATIONS ASSOCIATE. DEFENDANT EDWIN ENRIQUEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOMESHARE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ, EDWIN $308.46 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $358.46, FOR RENT & UTILITIES MINUS SECURITY DEPOSIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/20/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR BY COLIN BLUNSTONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOMESHARE INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ NOT STATED. SERVED DEC-19-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ, EDWIN
DECLARATION OF (SC-150) FORM USED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOMESHARE INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOMESHARE INC.
